name: WfSplit
description: Bus splitter, the routing-family chain head: fills the Main and AUX buses. Mode DUAL sends the L input to Main and the R input to AUX (two independent paths); COPY sends the stereo input to both (two parallel paths). SidCh re-points the pedal's mono SIDECHAIN bus. Pair with a WfMerge tail. Original effect by Waveformer.

params.name: Mode
params.explanation: DUAL: L input to Main, R input to AUX, two independent paths. COPY: the stereo input to both, two parallel paths.

params.name: Main
params.explanation: Level into the Main bus. 100 is unity.

params.name: AUX
params.explanation: Level into the AUX bus. 100 is unity.

params.name: SidCh
params.explanation: What the mono SIDECHAIN bus carries. L+R leaves the pedal's own choice; L or R keys detectors off that input alone.

params.name: SidLv
params.explanation: Level of the SIDECHAIN write. 50 is unity, 100 is double. Used only when SidCh is L or R.
